routing_examples: Turn on the patio lights on Mondays and Wednesday at sunset and turn off at sunrise next day
If I am not home by 7pm, turn on the porch light and set the thermostat to 72 degrees

Create a new routine to turn on the living room lights and play music when I say 'Good evening'

router_hints: Use this intent for creating or editing routine logic (if-then conditions, schedules, actions, rules).
